products.title: Kashmiri Cashmere Shawl - Ivory
products.description: Hand-woven Kashmiri cashmere shawl with fine pashmina weave. Lightweight yet warm, perfect for export.
products.care_instructions: Dry clean only. Store in breathable bag.

products.title: Pure Pashmina Shawl - Burgundy
products.description: Ultra-fine pashmina from Changthangi goats. Exceptionally soft with natural warmth retention.
products.care_instructions: Hand wash in cold water with mild detergent. Lay flat to dry.

products.title: Embroidered Cashmere Scarf - Navy
products.description: Luxurious cashmere scarf with traditional Kashmiri embroidery in gold silk thread.
products.care_instructions: Dry clean recommended. Handle embroidery with care.
